hero_subtitle: SFTY connects UBO screening with sanctions, PEP, and adverse media checks to create risk-based onboarding workflows with audit-ready evidence and streamlined case management.

problem_title: Ubo reviews stall when screenings stay disconnected
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to link ultimate beneficial ownership data with sanctions, PEP and adverse media checks across multiple systems. This disconnection creates manual bottlenecks and weakens audit trails for onboarding decisions at VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates ultimate beneficial ownership data with sanctions, PEP and adverse media screenings into one risk-based onboarding workflow that preserves audit trails and accelerates VASP review processes.
workflow_title: From UBO screening to onboarding approval
workflow_description: SFTY connects UBO checks with sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening, routing reviews into structured cases leading to documented onboarding decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP UBO screening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures UBO screening by connecting identity, company, sanctions and adverse media checks into connected onboarding workflows for VASP compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect UBO and sanctions checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates outputs from UBO, sanctions, PEP and adverse media providers to create risk-based review cases for consistent, policy-driven onboarding decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence for UBO?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves all UBO screening data, decision logs and supporting evidence in an auditable case history for regulatory review and ongoing compliance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple KYC, KYB and screening providers, consolidating their outputs into one workflow without replacing existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace UBO or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance layer above UBO and screening providers, organizing their results into structured cases and audit-ready workflows.
final_title: Structure UBO screening into controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects UBO, sanctions, PEP and adverse media screening into risk-based onboarding and audit-ready case management.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
